mapper.select: SELECT * FROM NOTIFICATIONS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY CREATE_AT DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
mapper.update: UPDATE NOTIFICATIONS SET IS_READ = 'Y' WHERE NOTI_NO = #{notiNo}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NOTIFICATIONS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND NOTI_URL LIKE '%' || #{stockId} || '%' AND TRUNC(CREATE_AT) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
mapper.update: UPDATE NOTIFICATIONS SET IS_READ = 'Y' WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND IS_READ = 'N'
